response.global_analysis: Dialogue segment in Scene 1 (mixed JP/EN) and Narrated segment in Scene 3 (EN) were segmented to respect the 50-character limit and audio pauses. Scene 2 features Ouro Kronii's performance of 'Zankyou Sanka'; the reference JSON lyrics matched phonetics and were used as a base, with additional transcription for the second half of the performance. Timestamps are precisely aligned to vocal onsets and offsets, ensuring no overlap or premature cutoffs. Included the on-screen song title as per secondary priority.

Zankyou Sanka
Who is the phantom flower that blooms on the sleeve?

subtitles.original: ただ そこに藍を落とした
subtitles.english: I just dropped my indigo dye over there

subtitles.original: 派手に色を溶かす夜に
subtitles.english: On a night when the colors dissolve gaudily
With the moon of silver vermilion added

subtitles.original: 転がるように風を切って
subtitles.english: Cutting through the wind like rolling

subtitles.original: 躓くごとに強くなった
subtitles.english: I got stronger with each stumble

subtitles.original: 光も痛みも怒りも全部 抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Embracing all the light, pain, and anger
If you're not chosen,
then it's fine to choose
Voice, echo
beyond the night
Resonate to the scenery so far away

subtitles.original: あんなに遠くの景色まで響き渡れ
subtitles.english: that was blurred by tears
What are you playing?
Who do you want to reach?
It's okay to remain uncertain
No matter how dark the feelings
No matter how long the struggle
Sing and scatter, reverberation
Dancing alone through a thousand nights
If I tie the sash correctly

subtitles.original: 派手な色も負かす様に
subtitles.english: To outshine even gaudy colors
The deep crimson scent is so touching

subtitles.original: この先どんなつらい時も
subtitles.english: From now on, no matter how hard it gets

subtitles.original: 口先よりも胸を張って
subtitles.english: I'll puff out my chest instead of just talking

subtitles.original: 抱いた夢の灯を全部辿るだけ
subtitles.english: Just following all the lights of the dreams I held
Not for the sake of running away

subtitles.original: ここまで来たんじゃないだろ？
subtitles.english: did I come this far, right?
If you're not chosen,
then it's fine to choose

subtitles.original: 声を枯らして 燃える花のように
subtitles.english: With a withered voice, like a burning flower
If it lights up the darkness
Even answers that are too ambiguous
I'll turn them into a musical score

subtitles.original: 夜を数えて 朝を描くような
subtitles.english: Counting the nights, like drawing the morning
I'll play a vivid sound
No matter how deep the regret
No matter how high the limit
Erase them, reverberation

subtitles.original: In the heavenly realm, there is a Lake of Light
subtitles.english: In the heavenly realm, there is a Lake of Light
that controls all worlds,
and Kronii would always observe

subtitles.original: the human worlds from there out of curiosity.
subtitles.english: the human worlds from there out of curiosity.
